working: refCurves and mixCurves now declared as {@const} inside {#if showVocalEq[song.id]} block
vocal-eq-analyzer: Python script + endpoint both work end-to-end
torchcodec 0.11.1 installed, Demucs saves stems correctly

notes: Root cause of expand crash: refCurves and mixCurves were used in vocal EQ template section but never declared with {@const}. Accessing .length on undefined threw TypeError that crashed Svelte reactivity, breaking all song expand clicks. Fixed by adding two missing {@const} filter declarations inside showVocalEq conditional block.
